How It Works

Three steps to a fully automated creator business

STEP 01
✦

Sign Up

Create your account in 30 seconds. No credit card required to start.

STEP 02
◈

Pick Your Agents

Select which AI agents to deploy. Configure each one with your voice, content rules, and goals.

STEP 03
◉

They Work While You Sleep

Your agents reply to fans, post content, hunt leaks, and optimize revenue — automatically.

Ready to automate your empire?

Join 500+ creators who've deployed their AI crew. Start with 2 agents free — no card needed.
